title: The Cheeky Panda Ultra Soft Balsam 4 Ply Facial Tissues Box | 48 Tissues | Aloe Vera Infused Balsam Tissues
features: Balsam Tissues – Each tissue is infused with Aloe Vera lotion, combined with the super soft bamboo texture. These facial tissues will leave your nose feeling soothed, even during the toughest of colds.

Why Bamboo? – We can sustainably harvest and regrow Bamboo 35 times faster than it takes a full tree to grow. Why not utilise our earth’s fastest growing plant instead of chopping down our forests? Try bamboo today!

The Sustainable Choice – The Cheeky Panda is a company dedicated to reducing worldwide deforestation by making our products from bamboo rather than tree paper. We work closely with the WWF and FSC in conserving our forests. Choose the sustainable choice, choose The Cheeky Panda.

Kind To Skin – One of the reasons we love Bamboo, is that it is naturally hypoallergenic. By having longer fibres, bamboo gives our balsam tissues a softer texture. Traditional facial tissues often have tissue dust on the surface which can cause irritation. Our Bamboo Balsam Tissues are tissue dust free!
Available as Single Boxes and Multipacks – You can buy these balsam tissues in single packs of 48 tissues, or in tissues box multipack of 12 boxes. Try newest Cheeky Panda tissues today!
description: Product Description The newest Cheeky Panda Tissues in our range, our soothing bamboo balsam tissues. These facial tissues are infused with an aloe vera lotion, giving you the softest bamboo experience we can offer. Each tissues box contains 48 balsam tissues. Available in multipack boxes of 12, or in single tissue boxes. Our balsam tissues are plastic free and petroleum free. Certified Vegan and naturally hypoallergenic. Each box bought from The Cheeky Panda will result in a donation to the WWF. Ingredients 100% Bamboo tissue, Aqua, Glycerin, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract Manufacturer Contact Information The Cheeky Panda Ltd., Ground Floor, 10 Lower Thames Street, London, EC3R 6EN, UK. The Cheeky Panda Ireland Ltd., Unit 3D, North Point House, North Point Business Park, New Mallow Road, Cork, T23 AT2P, Ireland. See more
